visual_description: A woman with blonde, wavy hair and a dark sweater sits beside a man with dark hair and a striped shirt, both holding small pieces of food. They are seated in a crowded indoor setting, with other people visible in the background, some out of focus. The woman gestures with her hands while looking toward the man, who gazes at her with his mouth slightly open.
